title: Ethinyl Estradiol and Norethindrone (Oral Contraceptives): MedlinePlus Drug Information
text:
of the body and causes pain, heavy or irregular menstruation [periods], and other symptoms). Talk to your doctor about the risks of using this medication for your condition.
Some oral contraceptives are also used to treat acne. Oral contraceptives treat acne by decreasing the amounts of certain natural substances that can cause acne.
This medication may be prescribed for other uses; ask your doctor or pharmacist for more information.
What special precautions should I follow? 
Before taking ethinyl estradiol and norethindrone oral contraceptives, tell your doctor or pharmacist if you are allergic to this drug, any part of this drug, or any other drugs, foods or substances. 
Tell your doctor or pharmacist about the allergy and what symptoms you had. you should know that some medications should not be taken with ethinyl estradiol and norethindrone oral contraceptives. 
Make sure you have discussed any medications you are currently taking or plan to take before starting ethinyl estradiol and norethindrone oral contraceptives with your doctor and pharmacist. 
Before starting, stopping, or changing any medications while taking ethinyl estradiol and norethindrone oral contraceptives, please get the advice of your doctor or pharmacist.you should also know that some medications may decrease the effectiveness of oral contraceptives (birth control pills).
